articles.title: Prime Lending Rates Dip: If You Have Excellent Credit, Now May Be The Best Time To Get A Loan
articles.summary: With over a dozen credit cards and millions of credit card points racked up, Nancy Jiang condenses the complex world of card-churning for maximum rewards with minimum effort. Her work has been featured in national publications such as The US Sun.

articles.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Bank raises prime lending rate for first time in 17 years
articles.summary: TOKYO, July 31 (Reuters) - Japan's largest lender Mitsubishi UFJ Bank will raise its short term prime lending rate for the first time in 17 years after the Bank of Japan hiked short term interest rates to 0.25%, it said on Wednesday. The rate will rise to ...

articles.title: China holds 1-year loan prime rate steady at 3%
articles.summary: China's 1-year Loan Prime Rate was held steady at 3.00%, unchanged from the previous 3.00%. With no absolute or percentage change, the central bank maintained its policy stance, signaling continuity in short-term benchmark funding costs. The unchanged ...

articles.title: Economic buzz: China's central bank keeps loan prime rate unchanged
articles.summary: Mumbai, Jan. 20 -- China's central bank kept its loan prime rates unchanged on Tuesday as the authorities focus on targeted support for specific sectors to bolster a slowing economy instead of broad policy easing. The People's Bank of China held its 1-year ...
